text: Bitcoin's 2.1% decline outpacing Ethereum's 0.7% drop signals renewed caution toward risk assets, with Bitcoin dominance rising to 55.8% as traders rotate toward the perceived safety of the largest asset. The Fear & Greed index at 17—extreme fear—and worsening 5 points over a week suggests capitulation sentiment is deepening rather than stabilizing. Volume at $66B remains relatively subdued for panic conditions, indicating this pullback may lack conviction from larger participants.
